title: Ace’s Fate and the End of the War: Rising Conflict
description: In the Marineford War storyline, this section centers on Whitebeard, Unknown person #7, Blackbeard, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2 as the scene develops across pages 5–8.
scene: This scene advances the Marineford War conflict through Whitebeard, Unknown person #7, Blackbeard, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #1, focusing on the immediate stakes of ace’s fate and the end of the war: rising conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Looks like he still wants to go...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Damn it... they just don't stop!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...!! that couldn't have hit them, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's gonna hit us!! Full speed ahead!!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Then we'll just have to accept

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That luck was on their side!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But they're on the sea floor!

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: But how will we pursue them!!?

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Yup. Long time no see, buggy.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: We'll follow you. For our entire lives!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I agreed to fight with Whitebeard,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: But red hair wasn't in the agreement.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Will only increase casualties on both sides!!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: But if anyone still wants to go,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: How about it, teach....!! No... Blackbeard!

summary: This scene advances the Marineford War conflict through Whitebeard, Unknown person #7, Blackbeard, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #1, focusing on the immediate stakes of ace’s fate and the end of the war: rising conflict.
